top_signals.title: Berg Propulsion Secures Six-Vessel Equipment Order
top_signals.summary: Swedish marine propulsion technology company Berg Propulsion has secured a contract to supply propulsion packages for six 7,000-dwt multi-purpose dry cargo vessels being built by Jiangsu Dajin Heavy Industry in China for UK shipowner and operator Carisbrooke Shipping.The six vessels…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Guardian Metal, Montana Mining Association forge US tungsten processing alliance
top_signals.summary: First shipments of legacy ore are expected by late summer 2026.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.
